title: Warium n' Spell books
description: Adds various spells based on modern weapons
body:
This mod is an addon to Warium and Iron's spell n' spell book, adding many tech-based spells 

**What does it add**

- Small bullet spell (of which 3 types)
- Medium bullet spell (of which 3 types)
- Large bullet spell (of which 3 types)
- Extra large bullet spell
- Small Shell spell (of which 2 types)
- Medium Shell spell (of which 3 types)
- Large Shell spell (of which 6 types)
- Artillery spell (of which 4 types)
- Mortar spell (of which 2 types)

**What will be added in the future?**
- Radiation spell 
- Robot Summon spell
- Missile spell
- **Nuke spell**
- And **more**

Requires **Warium** and **Iron's Spell N' Spell Book** to work.

many more spells will be added in the future!

Report bugs in the **comments** or tell me what you would like to see in the mod

Updates to this mod will not be frequent but will take time
